atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports knee pain following moving boxes.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports knee pain that began over the weekend following repetitive movements, such as moving boxes down basement stairs.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: He describes equal pain in both knees.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: He denies any injury.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: He has previously experienced knee problems, attributing them to the repetition and weight of the boxes.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: He has taken Tylenol and icing with limited relief.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: He denies fever, chills, or nausea.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: He reports no other systemic symptoms.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: He is currently taking Synthroid for hypothyroidism.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: He is currently taking immunosuppressants for his kidney transplant.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals mild edema and erythema in the right knee, with decreased range of motion upon palpation.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The left knee appears normal.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: A two out of six systolic ejection murmur is auscultated, which is stable.

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: White blood cell count is within normal limits.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's knee pain is diagnosed as an acute exacerbation of underlying arthritis.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Repetitive strain is suspected as a complication.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports knee pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has hypothyroidism.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has a kidney transplant.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes Ultram 50 milligrams every six hours as needed.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders an autoimmune panel.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician recommends the patient take it easy.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician instructs the patient to discuss referral to physical therapy if symptoms persist.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders thyroid labs to monitor Synthroid levels.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Follow up in four weeks to assess response to treatment.
